ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., RB, WR, FB) */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League in which the team competes */,
  "city" TEXT /* City the team represents */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the stadium */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the stadium */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of statistics */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player these statistics belong to */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played by the player */,
  "rushing_touchdowns" INTEGER /* Number of rushing touchdowns */,
  "receiving_touchdowns" INTEGER /* Number of receiving touchdowns */,
  "interception_return_touchdowns" INTEGER /* Number of touchdowns from interception returns */,
  "kick_return_touchdowns" INTEGER /* Number of touchdowns from kick returns */,
  "punt_return_touchdowns" INTEGER /* Number of touchdowns from punt returns */,
  "total_touchdowns" INTEGER /* Total touchdowns scored by the player */,
  "rushing_yards" INTEGER /* Total rushing yards gained by the player */,
  "receiving_yards" INTEGER /* Total receiving yards gained by the player */,
  "total_yards" INTEGER /* Total yards gained by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "team_id_home" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "team_id_away" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "score_home" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "score_away" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance at the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_team_id_away FOREIGN KEY ("team_id_away") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_team_id_home FOREIGN KEY ("team_id_home") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_statistics" (
  "game_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game statistic record */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game these statistics belong to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player whose statistics are recorded */,
  "rushing_yards" INTEGER /* Total rushing yards gained by the player in the game */,
  "receiving_yards" INTEGER /* Total receiving yards gained by the player in the game */,
  "passes_completed" INTEGER /* Number of passes completed by the player in the game */,
  "passes_attempted" INTEGER /* Number of passes attempted by the player in the game */,
  "passing_yards" INTEGER /* Total passing yards gained by the player in the game */,
  "interceptions_thrown" INTEGER /* Number of interceptions thrown by the player in the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_statistics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who is injured */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the injury */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the injury */,
  "date_reported" TEXT /* Date when the injury was reported */,
  "estimated_recovery_time" INTEGER /* Estimated recovery time in days */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the coach belongs to */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of coaching experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., coach, analyst, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "downloads" (
  "download_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each downloadable item */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file to be downloaded */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the file on the server */,
  "download_date" TEXT /* Date when the file was downloaded */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who downloaded the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("download_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_downloads_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_game_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game this performance belongs to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player whose performance is recorded */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating of the player's performance in the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_performance_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_performance_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wearable_data" (
  "wearable_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wearable data record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who wore the device */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game this data belongs to */,
  "heart_rate" INTEGER /* Heart rate of the player during the game */,
  "distance_traveled" REAL /* Distance traveled by the player during the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wearable_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wearable_data_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wearable_data_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "video_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis record */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game this analysis belongs to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player whose analysis is recorded */,
  "time_on_field" REAL /* Time the player spent on the field */,
  "touches" INTEGER /* Number of touches by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_video_analysis_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_video_analysis_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_drills" (
  "drill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each drill record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who participated in the drill */,
  "drill_name" TEXT /* Name of the drill */,
  "drill_date" TEXT /* Date the drill was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("drill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_drills_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
